testcase.name: submitorder

failure.message: [public void rahulshetty.tests.SubmitOrderTest.submitorder(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) throws java.io.IOException,java.lang.InterruptedException] has no parameters defined but was found to be using a data provider (either explicitly specified or inherited from class level annotation). Data provider mismatch Method: submitorder([java.lang.String arg0, java.lang.String arg1, java.lang.String arg2]) Arguments: [(java.util.HashMap) {prod=ZARA COAT 3, pass=Password@123, email=ekanthrajan@gmail.com}]

testcase.failure:
